name: @finlayjn/asyncapi-swift-ws-template
description: AsyncAPI Generator template for Swift 6 WebSocket clients

server.description: Name of the server from the AsyncAPI spec to use for connection URL.

packageName.description: Name for the generated Swift Package. Defaults to the spec title in PascalCase.

msgpackFormat.description: Wire layout for msgpack messages: 'map' (keyed dictionaries) or 'array' (positional). Only applies when serialization=msgpack.

typePrefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to all generated Swift type names (e.g. 'OMN' produces OMNPlaceOrder, OMNWebSocketClient, etc.).

formatter.description: Shell command to format generated Swift files. Receives file paths as arguments (e.g. 'swift-format -i', 'swiftformat').

allowNameCollisions.description: When 'true', allow multiple messages to share the same 'name' field. Colliding messages are disambiguated using their component key (e.g. order_preview_response). Default is 'false', which treats collisions as a generation error.

perspective.description: Perspective from which the AsyncAPI spec is written: 'server' (default, standard AsyncAPI v3 — send means server-to-client) or 'client' (send means client-to-server).
